style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial layered diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, drawn as a three-tier pyramid. Bottom tier: a long row of small boxes each labelled APP with a tiny robot icon, captioned ONE AGENT PER APP: HEALTH, PATCHING, SECURITY. Middle tier: a few boxes labelled OVERSIGHT AGENTS, captioned TELEMETRY, UPTIME, STATUS. Top tier: two boxes labelled ARCHITECT AGENTS, captioned INTEGRATE AND REBUILD. To the right, a separate slim panel labelled APPROACH 4: HEADLESS API LAYER shows several small API plug icons that a couple of small defined-agent tokens connect into. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
